projects.title: InfrX Mortgage Pipeline
projects.description: Reads 100–2,000 page unstructured mortgage PDFs and reconstructs them: 91% classification accuracy across 27 document types, table stitching via probabilistic threading, VLM + Tesseract dual-mode extraction (~6.5 pages/sec at zero API cost).

projects.title: OrbitClean
projects.description: Satellite image processing system that detects illegal dumps using Sentinel-2A imagery and a Random Forest classifier. Route optimization engine using the Clarke-Wright algorithm with AUC 0.80 risk predictor over a 552-cell grid.

projects.title: Aura AI
projects.description: Healthcare diagnostics tool that verifies patient data cryptographically without exposing raw records. Won against 200+ teams nationally. Hash-map based data structures for secure and efficient patient record handling.

projects.title: Architrust
projects.description: Distributed system that coordinates computation across independent nodes without centralizing data. Structured logging and benchmarking to track performance and handle node failures gracefully.

projects.title: Spatial-Temporal Veracity
projects.description: Decentralized ledger system with graph algorithm-based verification to ensure data integrity at scale. Prevents tampering across distributed nodes using cryptographic proofs.

points: Built and shipped 10+ full-stack projects using Flutter, FastAPI, Node.js, and MongoDB from scratch to production.
Cut API response times by up to 35% by fixing bottlenecks and adding caching; handled rate limiting and error logging in live systems.
Applied OOP design patterns and data structures to keep codebases clean and maintainable across multiple projects.
Working on protocol frameworks for India's Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) using C++ and Python.
Contributing to hardware-bound cryptographic validation and data integrity verification systems.
Built a medical image analysis pipeline for breast cancer detection using MedSAM, ResNet, and U-Net in PyTorch.
Added XAI heatmaps so doctors could understand model predictions; co-authoring a research paper on this work.

achievements.title: InfrX 2026 — 2nd Place
achievements.description: Won 2nd place and a ₹75,000 prize at the InfrX 2026 Hackathon with an AI mortgage document pipeline — 91% accuracy across 2,295 test pages. Team Noobda, REVA University.

achievements.title: National Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: Won Cardano Hackathon Asia beating 200+ teams with Aura AI Diagnostics — a cryptographic healthcare verification tool. Took home a $2,000 (~₹1.8 lakh) prize.

achievements.title: Personal Patent Filed
achievements.description: Filed patent for Decentralized Spatial-Temporal Data Veracity System — a distributed ledger with graph algorithm-based tamper-proof verification.

achievements.title: Google DeepMind Finalist
achievements.description: Reached the finals of Google DeepMind Hackathon with Architrust — a distributed, privacy-preserving computation system.

achievements.title: AWI SpaceTech Top 5
achievements.description: Top 5 finish at AWI SpaceTech Hackathon with OrbitClean — satellite image processing for illegal dump detection using Sentinel-2A and ML.

achievements.title: Member, GDG Bangalore
achievements.description: Member of Google Developer Groups (GDG) Bangalore — engaging with the developer community, attending tech talks, and collaborating on Google tech ecosystem projects.

achievements.title: Technical Lead, Algorand Club
achievements.description: Technical Lead at Algorand Club, REVA University. Ran workshops and smart contract projects. Organised 5+ hackathons and competed in 20+ including Adobe India and HackRx.

freelance.intro: I take on freelance builds — full-stack apps, AI integrations, and websites that don't look like everyone else's.

projects.name: Shree Nidhi Security Services

projects.name: VedaAI
projects.description: AI-powered question paper generator that builds exam papers from syllabus input.

reviews.text: Sai Pranav proved that no matter the pressure or how little time there is, he completes projects outstandingly.
Fast, reliable, and actually has good taste in design. A rare combination.
Cleanest code I've seen in years. He knows how to handle complex state management.
Creative design ideas and a unique UI experience. The attention to detail is flawless.
Highly intuitive UX. Delivered exactly what we needed before we even knew we needed it.
